channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: ‘The Voice’ Winners: Which Coach & Singer Won Each Season?
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to our podcast, where we dish out the latest on your favorite shows. Today, we're talking about the latest season of The Voice. The 29th season, dubbed the "Battle of Champions," just wrapped up on April 14th, and we've got the scoop.
[Short music transition]
Host: The new format featured a powerhouse trio of coaches: Adam Levine, Kelly Clarkson, and John Legend. And the winner of this season is... Team Adam's Alexia Jayy. She wowed the judges with her performances, including a show-stopping duet with Adam Levine on "Sunday Morning."
[Short music transition]
Host: But Alexia wasn't the only star of the show. Team Kelly's Liv Ciara took second place, while Lucas West and Mikenley Brown rounded out the top four. And with this win, Adam Levine has now taken home the coveted title four times as a coach.
[Short music transition]
Host: But if we're talking about the coach with the most wins, that title still belongs to Blake Shelton. He's had a champion from his team in nine out of 27 seasons. That's a pretty impressive track record. And with 23 seasons under his belt, he's also the coach with the longest tenure on the show.
[Short music transition]
Host: Over the years, we've seen a bunch of big-name coaches come and go, from Christina Aguilera to Ariana Grande, and even Nick Jonas. But one thing's for sure - The Voice always brings the talent and the drama. We'll be keeping an eye on what's next for this popular reality singing competition.
[Outro music plays]
Host: That's it for today, folks. Thanks for tuning in. If you want to hear more about your favorite shows, be sure to subscribe to our podcast. We'll catch you in the next one.
